title: zkVerify Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The report is thorough and identifies potential security vulnerabilities in the zkVerify smart contracts. However, the impact and proof of concept (PoC) sections are incomplete, which limits the effectiveness of the report in providing actionable insights for mitigating the identified vulnerabilities.
audit.improvements: Complete the impact and PoC sections for all identified vulnerabilities. Provide more detailed descriptions of how each vulnerability can be exploited and the potential consequences. Additionally, include recommended fixes or mitigations for each vulnerability to enhance the report's usefulness.
